title: Doflamingo Tightens the Birdcage — Part 3
description: The shrinking Birdcage turns Dressrosa into a death trap while Doflamingo resets the rules of his game.
scene: On pages 14–18, Trafalgar Law, King Riku, Luffy, Doflamingo, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The "GAMMA knife" destroys your organs without leaving any external wounds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As a doctor, this is my absolute diagnosis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You've really done it now!!! What have you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You just call whatever group of shits that happen to be convenient for you your family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: And then when your own little brother tried to stop you from flying off the deep end, you shot him dead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: ...yeah... he betrayed me... that was unfair- tunate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: to think that he would ever point a gun in my direction...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: But you knew that Cora-san would never actually pull the trigger...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: After all... you and I are the same.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: that day... the one that should have died was you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: ...shall I say the words you so desperately want to hear, law...?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: To me, Corazon was nothing more than a burden... a hindrance and an eyesore...!! And that day, what a relief it was slaughter-...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: ...!! go to Hell you fucking demon!!!

summary: This part focuses on doflamingo tightens the birdcage, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
